turns.name: JOHN G. ROBERTS, JR.
turns.text: In case 11-9953, Boyer versus Louisiana, the petition for a writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted. Justice Alito has filed a concurring opinion in which Justices Scalia and Thomas have joined. Justice Sotomayor has filed the dissenting opinion in which Justices Ginsburg, Breyer, and Kagan have joined.
